name: Greece Community
description_short: Greece, NY Parks and Recreation Department website. Access currently restricted (403 Forbidden error). Unable to verify consumer finance services.
description_long: Greece Community appears to be listed as a payday-alternatives lender, but the website URL (https://greeceny.gov/departments/parksandrecreation/) belongs to the Town of Greece, New York's Parks and Recreation Department—a municipal government agency, not a financial services provider. The page returns a 403 Forbidden error, preventing any verification of actual services or business operations. Based on the URL structure and domain, this appears to be a government entity providing recreational services to Greece, NY residents, not a consumer finance company. No evidence suggests Greece Community operates as a credit union, CDFI, payday alternative lender, or any other financial service referenced in the company profile categories. The miscategorization appears to be a data entry error or listing mistake within the CreditDoc database. Without accessible website content or verifiable financial service offerings, it is impossible to accurately assess what products or services this entity provides to consumers. Any profile information beyond the government agency identity would be speculative. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)
